PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'odoo'; & E:\\workspace\\my_odoo_project\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import psycopg2; conn = psycopg2.connect\(host='localhost', port=5434, dbname='odoo', user='odoo', password='odoo'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('SELECT key, substring\(value,1,40\) FROM ir_config_parameter WHERE key LIKE %s', \('%diecut_knowledge.claude%',\)\); rows = cur.fetchall\(\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]; cur.execute\('SELECT key, substring\(value,1,40\) FROM ir_config_parameter WHERE key LIKE %s', \('%ai_backend%',\)\); rows = cur.fetchall\(\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]; conn.close\(\)")
